title: The Effect of Calcium on Postprandial Lipid Profile and Appetite
text:
Summary: The purpose of this study is to investigate the effect of calcium on postprandial lipid profile and appetite.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 healthy meals 

 BMI 24-31 kg/m2 

 age between 18-50 years 

 hemoglobin >8 mmol/L 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 donation of blood 6 months before and under the study 

 milk allergy, diabetes, hypertension, hyperlipidemia, cronic infectious disease 

 use of dietary supplements 3 months before and under the study 

 smoking 

 elite athletes 

 use of medication
